(D514).

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-02-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Request For Default Judgment In Favor Of Old Republic Title Company
Off Calendar Jul-11-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to cross-defendant Yao Hui Pang, a/k/a Yao Huipang.
Dept. 514. Judge: Newton Lam. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

Roger R. Rubin, Esq. appeared for cross-complainant Old Republic Title Company.
Alicia Kamian, Vice President for cross-complainant Old Republic Title Company, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by cross-defendant Yao Hui Pang, a/k/a Yao Huipang.
Cross-complainant's First Amended Complaint for Indemnity, Contribution and Fraud was filed on June 20, 2018.
Substitute service on cross-defendant Yao Hui Pang, a/k/a Yao Huipang, took place on July 14, 2018, and was effectuated on July 26, 2018.
Default as to cross-defendant Yao Hui Pang, a/k/a Yao Huipang, was entered on September 20, 2018.
Plaintiff Qi Hui Sheng's complaint was dismissed with prejudice on December 5, 2018.
ROES 1 through 100 were dismissed on March 26, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of cross-complainant Old Republic Title Company, and against the defaulted cross-defendant Yao Hui Pang, a/k/a Yao Huipang, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $100,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,000.60.
Attorney Fees - $15,747.10.
Costs - $1,791.08.

Total - $123,538.60.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
